title: Growbox Environment Controller Contract (pots, 4 max)
draft_note: v4 renames zones to pots (4 donice in one chamber). 15 ML outputs, 128 features. Single active contract; v1–v3 retired.

configuration_model.simulator_note: Up to 4 pot slots; training scenarios randomize active count 0-4 and per-slot validity/irrigation — not always four pots.

hash.canonicalization: UTF-8 JSON with lexicographically sorted keys and separators ',' and ':'

notes: lights: pseudo-input lights_active (ML feature); relay via schedule/Nodeflow; safety thermal cutoff forces OFF; optional heat-assist policy; lamp heat watts in simulator config.
fan: jedno wyjście ML; kilka fizycznych wentylatorów → mapowanie w mostku sprzętowym.
irrigation_pot_N: 0–4 active pots (pots[N].irrigation.available); inactive = available false, safe output 0.
nutrient_heater: tank heater; heat_mat_pot_N: mat under pot (0 when pot or mat unavailable).

independence_rules: soil_moisture_pct and soil_temperature_c per pot are unrelated inputs (e.g. moisture probe + DS18B20 in pot).
nutrient_solution_temperature_c is separate from soil_temperature_c (DS18B20 in nutrient tank / feed line).
Compare solution vs soil temp in safety before irrigation — avoid cold nutrient on warm substrate.
availability_rule: When an actuator is unavailable, available is false, its maximum capability is zero, and its final safe output is zero.
